artifacts.summary: Session C progress: added irreflexive_mcs_has_strict_future lemma, proved unreachable cases via Temporal 4 closure, improved CantorApplication structure
Session D progress: added reflexivity derivation pattern for strict density proofs, reduced DensityFrameCondition sorries from 16 to 10
Iteration 3 analysis: confirmed all sorries are reflexive MCS cases requiring Finset.strongInductionOn iteration approach
Session E: Deep analysis of 13 sorries, confirmed reflexive MCS root cause, implementation path via Finset.strongInductionOn identified

partial_progress.details: Iteration 3: Deep analysis of remaining 13 sorries. Confirmed all are reflexive MCS cases where constructed witness V ~ M' in quotient. Direct proofs insufficient. Implementation path clear: use Finset.strongInductionOn on candidate distinguishing formulas. Handoff written with implementation approach.

completion_data.completion_summary: Iteration 3: Analysis phase complete. All 13 sorries confirmed to be reflexive MCS cases. Implementation path identified: well-founded iteration using Finset.strongInductionOn on candidate distinguishing formulas. Handoff written for next iteration.
